settings.eyebrow: Pet care with a happier rhythm
settings.heading: Furever Happy
settings.subheading: Comforting everyday essentials and feel-good finds for pets, their people, and the small rituals that make home brighter.

settings.heading: For the tiny tail-wag moments
settings.body: Furever Happy is shaping into a cheerful home for pet-inspired products that feel useful, warm, and easy to love. The first collection space is ready for Shopify products as soon as the catalog is added.

settings.heading: Start with the favorites
settings.body: Feature your first collection here. Until products are connected, these cards hold the space so the homepage still feels complete.
